call_chains.business_impact: Express app configuration changes may affect routing behavior.
call_chains.explanation: The app symbol is used in examples/content-negotiation/index.js to configure the Express app.

call_chains.business_impact: Changes to the app configuration may affect the formatting of user data.
call_chains.explanation: The app symbol is used in examples/content-negotiation/index.js to configure the Express app, and the format function is used to handle user data formatting.

safe_paths: No other paths are affected by the changes to the app symbol.
merge_recommendation: MERGE WITH CAUTION — MEDIUM risk untested Express app configuration changes exposed.
suggested_actions: Add tests for Express app configuration changes.
Verify the behavior of the format function with different user data.
